name: Berries with Yogurt Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender, combine all ingredients except strawberries.
2. Process until smooth.
3. Into each dessert dish, put 1/4 of the strawberries and top each portion with 1/4 of the sauce.
4. Serve immediately. Each serving is 1/2 fruit, 1/4 milk, and 15 optional calories from Weight Watchers pamphlet, 1988.
